name: InvisibleFerret
description: [InvisibleFerret](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1245) is a modular python malware that is leveraged for data exfiltration and remote access capabilities.(Citation: ESET Contagious Interview BeaverTail InvisibleFerret February 2025)(Citation: Zscaler ContagiousInterview BeaverTail InvisibleFerre
